evals.prompt: Define reliability controls for a payment API whose provider is slow and occasionally times out; duplicate charges are unacceptable.
evals.expected_output: An evidence-backed, scoped response following the skill workflow.
assertions: Treats retries as a bounded budget

evals.prompt: Review an SLO that says 99.99% of Kubernetes pods must be running and pages on every failed health check.
evals.expected_output: An evidence-backed, scoped response following the skill workflow.
assertions: Rejects pod state as sufficient user SLI
Defines event population and good predicate
Uses actionable symptom or burn alerts
Does not copy nines without product evidence

evals.prompt: Plan recovery for a regional data service with backups but no restore exercises.
evals.expected_output: An evidence-backed, scoped response following the skill workflow.
